data.content: Implementation review requested changes. 1. src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1738-1749 still lets runaway descendants survive terminate: the 5 s SIGKILL fallback first checks process.kill(pid, 0) on the process-group leader, so if the leader exits after SIGTERM but a child in the detached group stays alive, the check throws and the code never sends process.kill(-pid, 'SIGKILL'). That leaves the original failure mode unresolved for wrapper/descendant processes. Tests and build passed otherwise (bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and targeted eslint on the touched files), but this kill-path gap blocks approval until the fallback is made group-safe and covered by a regression test.
